positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a lone mountain peak rising dramatically from stylized, flowing geometric clouds and abstract deep-sea bioluminescence. The overall composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring crisp, clean silhouettes and strong, ethereal contrasts. Color palette utilizes deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, pearlescent gold, and clean white. Inspired by art deco and modern tattoo flash art, with thick, clean lines suitable for screen printing. Use a blend of vaporwave geometry and natural elements. High contrast, flat graphic design style, vector art quality, negative space emphasis.
